<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Pink Peony](images/04-pink-peony.jpg)

Peonies have a season measured in weeks. From mid-May to the first week of July, our growers in Cornwall send us crates a few times a week, and we wrap them in nothing but their own foliage and a sheet of brown paper.

## What's in it

- 8–10 pink peony stems (Sarah Bernhardt or Coral Charm depending on the week)
- Their own leaves only — no fillers

## Care

Peonies open over 48 hours. Buy them tight, watch them bloom. Keep cool overnight to extend the show by a day or two.
